[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0011010111 6
1 0101100101 5
2 1111001001 6
3 1011001001 5
4 1010110000 4
5 1110111111 9
6 1101011111 8
7 0101101101 6

01 0000110000 2
12 0000001011 3
23 0101000100 3
34 0000001000 1
45 1001110010 5
56 0100000000 1
67 1010001000 3
70 0000000000 a

02 0000010010 2
13 0101000101 4
24 0100000100 2
35 0000101010 3

71 0000110000 2
